## Quotation candidates (auto excerpt)

**gt-11 (excerpt):** - Frames three decisive war questions: ground invasion, nuclear use, and Al-Aqsa pathway escalation. - Argues escalation outcomes depend more on control/calibration than raw dominance. - Predicts US ground intervention, no near-term nuclear use, and later symbolic-religious escalation. ---
